motto: Every path knows the law — inspect, strip, clean, reconverge without violation.
operator_posture: Local-first inspection of THIS machine's traffic only — not third-party wiretap.

laws.title: Computer Fraud and Abuse Act — unauthorized access
laws.requirement: No exceeding authorized access to obtain information from protected computers.
laws.nexus_control: Gatekeeper IFF + DPI block C2/exfil vectors; no offensive pivot beyond operator host.

laws.title: Computer Fraud and Abuse Act — damage
laws.requirement: No knowingly causing damage to protected computers.
laws.nexus_control: RST_FLOOD, DDOS_FLOOD, SYN_FLOOD → heat crush + segment block.

laws.title: Electronic Communications Privacy Act — intercept
laws.requirement: No intentional interception of wire/electronic communications without consent or lawful authority.
laws.nexus_control: Capture limited to local NIC/tcpdump on operator host; dirty ring local-only; no upstream tap.

laws.title: Stored Communications Act
laws.requirement: No unauthorized access to stored electronic communications.
laws.nexus_control: Field drive append-only on operator path; privacy-guard on sensitive fd paths.

laws.title: Communications Act — CPNI
laws.nexus_control: Resolver + packet logs stay local; foreign ISP DNS egress blocked.

laws.title: FCC CPNI (voice/broadband)
laws.nexus_control: Charter/Spectrum and ISP DNS redirection classified foreign — blocked.

laws.title: FCC unlicensed RF devices
laws.requirement: Operate only on permitted UNII/ISM bands; no intentional interference.
laws.nexus_control: Passive scan + disconnect our station; NO jamming/deauth floods.

laws.title: Lawful RF kick chain
laws.requirement: Wire-layer cleanup only — disconnect, firewall, autokill; never overpower TX.

laws.title: GDPR — integrity and confidentiality
laws.requirement: Personal data processed with integrity and confidentiality.
laws.nexus_control: Loopback truth DNS; strip lane removes payload from clean paths; local logs.

laws.title: GDPR — security of processing
laws.nexus_control: Multi-path deinterlace + sovereign fabric seal on reconverged manifest.

laws.title: Network and Information Security
laws.requirement: DNS/service providers implement security risk management.

laws.title: COPPA
laws.requirement: Verifiable parental consent before collecting children's data.
laws.nexus_control: Ad/tracking domains blocked at resolver when adblock lists apply.

laws.title: Registrar Accreditation Agreement
laws.nexus_control: RDAP lookups documented; no local WHOIS forgery.

laws.title: DNS Resolver Integrity
laws.requirement: Resolver must not substitute answers without operator policy.
laws.nexus_control: Truth DNS trace-only; foreign resolvers blocked.

laws.title: Pen Register / Trap and Trace
laws.requirement: Non-content dial/connection records require legal process for third parties.
laws.nexus_control: Metadata strip lane on operator host only; dirty dump segregated.

laws.title: Local-first packet capture doctrine
laws.requirement: Dirty ring forensic; clean paths stripped; reconverge sealed.

forbidden_actions: Intentional RF jamming or deauthentication floods
Upstream ISP/tap interception of third-party communications
Exporting dirty-ring payload content to clean reconverge path
Forging DNS answers or WHOIS records
